overall.description: A third-person game scene following an armored character holding a torch through a dark, atmospheric gothic cemetery at night. The character explores overgrown paths, cobblestone walkways, and approaches a stone mausoleum with dramatic torch lighting illuminating gravestones and ruins.

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an overgrown grassy cemetery at night, holding a torch that illuminates tall stone columns and obelisks. The path ahead shows cobblestone and distant lantern light.

segments.scene_description: The character transitions onto a cobblestone path winding through cemetery ruins. A circular stone platform appears on the right while distant building lights become visible ahead.

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a dense section of the cemetery with small pyramidal grave markers and red mushrooms. A large stone mausoleum becomes visible on the right as the character approaches.

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the mausoleum entrance, passing tall obelisks and weathered gravestones. The warm light from the mausoleum windows illuminates the path as the character nears the arched doorway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dark, overgrown cemetery that gradually leads toward the illuminated entrance of a stone mausoleum. It begins with the character navigating through tall grass and stone obelisks, guided by the flickering glow of a torch. As the terrain shifts, the camera follows the character onto a winding cobblestone path that passes a circular stone platform and reveals distant building lights. The scene then moves through a denser area of pyramidal grave markers and red mushrooms before the massive silhouette of a mausoleum emerges on the right. Finally, the camera glides past weathered gravestones toward the arched doorway, where warm light spilling from the windows illuminates the path.
